regulations.name: Drone Rules, 2021
regulations.relevance: Mandates Remote ID on all drones >250g; enables CUAS systems to identify compliant drones via ASTM F3411; Digital Sky platform integration

regulations.name: Drone Certification Scheme (DCS)
regulations.relevance: Ensures drones have Remote ID; facilitates CUAS identification; creates baseline for drone registry

regulations.name: Drone (Amendment) Rules, 2022
regulations.relevance: Reduces administrative burden; Remote ID and NPNT requirements unchanged

regulations.name: Drone (Amendment) Rules, 2023
regulations.relevance: Supports domestic CUAS R&D testing; reduces barriers to CUAS prototype trials

regulations.name: Digital Sky Platform Manual
regulations.relevance: Critical infrastructure for CUAS identification; provides authoritative drone registry; integration APIs for CUAS systems

regulations.name: WPC Spectrum Allocation for CUAS
regulations.scope: Spectrum for CUAS jamming and detection
regulations.relevance: Legal framework for CUAS jammer operation; restricts civilian use of jammers; military and authorized agencies only

regulations.name: Indian Telegraph Act, 1885 (CUAS application)
regulations.relevance: Legal basis for RF jamming restrictions; only authorized agencies (military, paramilitary) can jam

regulations.name: Aircraft Act, 1934 (Drone Provisions)
regulations.relevance: CUAS engagements with drones governed by aviation law; engagement authorizations require aviation legal review

regulations.name: Aircraft Rules, 1937 (Drone Provisions)
regulations.relevance: Operational rules for drone operations; engagement rules-of-engagement framework

regulations.name: Defence Procurement Procedure (DPP) / Defence Acquisition Procedure (DAP)
regulations.relevance: Procurement framework for military CUAS; indigenous content thresholds; Make-I/Make-II for domestic R&D

regulations.name: GeM (Government e-Marketplace) Procurement Rules
regulations.relevance: Primary procurement channel for CUAS by Indian agencies; transparent tender process

regulations.name: SCOMET List (Export Controls)
regulations.scope: Export of dual-use items including CUAS components
regulations.relevance: Controls export of Indian CUAS technologies; Wassenaar Arrangement compliance

regulations.name: Information Technology Act, 2000 (Cybersecurity provisions)
regulations.relevance: Legal basis for cyber neutralization of drones; authorization requirements

regulations.name: National Cyber Security Policy
regulations.relevance: Framework for CUAS cyber operations; critical infrastructure CUAS protection

regulations.name: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 (Drone provisions)
regulations.relevance: Legal framework for prosecuting illegal drone operations; supports CUAS engagement authorization

regulations.name: Critical Information Infrastructure Protection Act (under formulation)
regulations.relevance: When enacted, will mandate CUAS for designated CII facilities

regulations.name: Wassenaar Arrangement (India membership)
regulations.scope: Dual-use export controls including CUAS technologies
regulations.relevance: Controls export of CUAS technologies; alignment with international export controls

regulations.name: Missile Technology Control Regime (MTCR)
regulations.relevance: Controls export of interceptor drones and missiles used in CUAS

trials.name: Aero India 2021 CUAS Demo
trials.scenario: Live demonstration of CUAS during Aero India 2021 air show
trials.outcome: Successful demonstration of detect-track-identify-neutralize sequence against multiple drone targets

trials.name: Aero India 2023 CUAS Demo
trials.scenario: Live demonstration of multiple CUAS systems during Aero India 2023
trials.outcome: Successful demonstration of swarm detection; partial success on swarm neutralization; varied performance across systems

trials.name: Northern Command CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Real-world operational trials against drone incursions from Pakistan
trials.outcome: Mixed results; successful in detecting and jamming some drones; others evaded

trials.name: BSF Punjab Border CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Real-world operational trials against drone incursions from Pakistan
trials.outcome: Successful in jamming and bringing down several drones; some drone drops continued

trials.name: Indira Gandhi International Airport CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Airport perimeter CUAS trials following drone sightings near airport
trials.outcome: Successful detection and tracking; safe neutralization without disrupting airport operations

trials.name: Republic Day 2023 CUAS Deployment
trials.scenario: VIP security during Republic Day parade
trials.outcome: No drone incursions during event; system performed as designed

trials.name: G20 Summit 2023 CUAS Deployment
trials.scenario: VIP security during G20 Summit 2023 with multiple heads of state
trials.outcome: No drone incursions during event; multi-layer deployment successful

trials.name: DRDO Trishul CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Trial of integrated soft kill + hard kill + DEW CUAS system
trials.outcome: Successful detection, tracking, identification; laser neutralization successful; HPM partial success

trials.name: Naval CUAS Trials (Visakhapatnam)
trials.scenario: Naval base protection trials against simulated drone threats
trials.outcome: Successful detection and tracking; soft kill neutralization effective; hard kill integration successful

trials.name: IAF Base CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Air base protection trials against drone threats
trials.outcome: Successful detection and tracking; soft kill effective; identified limitations against low-flying FPV drones

trials.name: CRPF Camp CUAS Trials
trials.scenario: Camp protection trials against drone threats in counter-insurgency areas
trials.outcome: Successful in jamming drones; some limitations in mountainous terrain

trials.name: Smart City CUAS Pilot (Pune)
trials.scenario: Smart city CUAS pilot integrated with city surveillance
trials.outcome: Successful detection and identification; integration with city ICCC demonstrated

trials.name: IOCL Refinery CUAS Trials
trials.outcome: Successful detection and jamming; safety protocols validated for hazardous environment

trials.name: Aero India 2025 CUAS Demo
trials.scenario: Live demonstration of advanced CUAS systems

trials.name: Eastern Command CUAS Trials
trials.outcome: Successful in mountainous terrain; identified high-altitude performance limitations

trials.name: DRDO 10kW Laser Trials
trials.scenario: Trial of 10kW fiber laser against drones
trials.outcome: Successful engagement of drones at 2.5km range; identified atmospheric limitations

trials.name: DRDO HPM Trials
trials.scenario: Trial of high-power microwave weapon against swarm
trials.outcome: Partial success against swarm; identified power output and beam shaping limitations

trials.name: Big Bang Boom Bhargavastra Trials
trials.scenario: Trials of integrated soft kill + hard kill CUAS system
trials.outcome: Successful engagement of multiple targets; swarm engagement demonstrated

incidents.drone: Small UAV (commercial drone, likely DJI Mavic)
incidents.counter: No CUAS deployed at time of incident
incidents.outcome: Drone dropped two IEDs near helicopter parking area; minor damage to roof; no casualties

incidents.drone: Multiple drones (likely DJI Mavic and custom FPV)
incidents.counter: DroneGun Tactical deployed after Jan 2022; limited pre-2022
incidents.outcome: Multiple drone incursions delivering weapons and narcotics; ~100+ incidents in 2022; many drones neutralized, some evaded

incidents.counter: BEL CUAS deployed after June 2021 attack
incidents.outcome: Drone detected and jammed; drone landed safely outside base perimeter

incidents.counter: Zen ZADS V3 deployed after detection
incidents.outcome: Drone detected and tracked; airport operations briefly suspended; drone left area
Drone sighted near facility; investigation ongoing; no engagement
Drone detected dropping contraband; investigation; engagement unsuccessful

incidents.drone: Multiple drones (likely DJI Mavic and FPV)
incidents.outcome: Multiple drone incursions in single night; some neutralized, some evaded; large narcotics seizure
Drone detected and engaged; drone evaded jamming and returned to Pakistan side
Drone detected; airport operations briefly suspended; drone left area
Drone engaged and brought down; weapons and narcotics seized
Multiple drones engaged; 3 neutralized, others evaded
Drone detected; engaged and brought down; operator arrested
Drone detected and jammed; drone left area
Drone sighted near military area; investigation; no engagement
Drone detected and tracked; operator identified via RF triangulation
Multiple drones engaged; 5 neutralized over 48 hours
Drone detected and engaged; partial neutralization
Drone detected; engaged and brought down; operator arrested
Multiple drones engaged; 4 neutralized over 72 hours
Drone swarm engaged; 5 neutralized, others evaded
Drone detected and tracked; jamming unsuccessful due to encrypted link
Multiple drones engaged; 6 neutralized over 96 hours

intel.importance: Strategic PSU-led system; backbone of Indian Army CUAS deployment; foundational for Make in India CUAS
intel.semi: Critical - FPGA, GPU, AI ASIC imported from US
intel.swarm: Medium - swarm detection mature; neutralization li
intel.outlook: Continued production; 100kW laser integration by 2026; expanded swarm capability by 2027; export to SE Asia and Middle East by 2025-26

intel.importance: National R&D-led system; technology demonstrator for indigenous CUAS capabilities; TOT vehicle to industry
intel.semi: Critical - FPGA, GPU imported; domestic R&D underway at C-DAC
intel.outlook: Trishul system operational by 2025; 100kW laser by 2026; HPM operational by 2027; expanded swarm neutralization by 2027

intel.importance: Indigenous commercial OEM; widely deployed at airports and refineries; cost-effective solution
intel.china: Medium - some commercial Chinese components in COTS hardware
intel.semi: High - GPU, FPGA, RF components imported
intel.outlook: Expansion into hard kill systems; AI enhancement; export market development by 2025-26

intel.semi: Critical - GPU, FPGA, AI ASIC imported
intel.outlook: Expanded smart city deployments by 2025-26; military variant development by 2026; export by 2027
